texto: Get out of bed forcing a smile. You may not smile because you are cheerful but if you will force yourself to smile you'll... be cheerful because you smile. Repeated experiments prove that when man assumes the facial expression of a given mental mood any given mood then that mental mood itself will follow.
explicacao: Citação de Kenneth Goode sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Get out of bed forcing a smile. You may not smile because you are cheerful but if you will force …” articula reflexao, mornings, smile em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao.
